---
name: Pattern Request
about: Propose a new pattern for this repo
labels: pattern-request
---

## The Production Problem

What breaks in production without this pattern? Describe a real failure scenario, not a hypothetical.

<!-- The most compelling pattern requests come from production incidents — "we had X happen and ended up building Y to prevent it." Theoretical gaps in the pattern catalog are lower priority. -->

## Why No Existing Pattern Covers It

Which patterns from the repo are closest? Why don't they address this problem?

## What You'd Build

If you were implementing this pattern, what's the core abstraction? What does the interface look like?

## System Types That Need It

Which system types (RAG, Agents, Streaming, Batch) would benefit from this pattern, and at what priority?

## Prior Art

Are there open-source implementations, blog posts, or incident reports that describe this pattern? Links appreciated.
